revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Jisha-bugyō]][[fa:جیشا بوگیو]][[ff:Jisha-bugyō]][[fr:Jisha-bugyō]][[it:Jisha-bugyō]][[ja:寺社奉行]][[ko:지사부교]][[pt:Jisha-bugyō]][[zh:寺社奉行]]
{{Italic title}} {{nihongo||寺社奉行|'''''Jisha-bugyō'''''|lit. "temple and shrine commissioner"}} was a position within the system for the administration of religion that existed from the {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}} to the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}} in Japan. Appointments to this prominent office were always ''{{ill|Fudai daimyō|en|Fudai daimyō|qid=Q643640|lt=Fudai daimyō|1=Fudai daimyō}}s'', the lowest-Ranking of the shogunate offices to be so restricted.<ref name="b323">Beasley, William G. (1955). ''Select Documents on Japanese Foreign Policy, 1853–1868'', p. 323.</ref>
This {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shogunate|1=Shogun}} title assigns an official the responsibility of suspervising shrines and temples.<ref>Nussbaum, Louis-Frédéric. (2005). "Jisha-bugyō" in {{Google books|p2QnPijAEmEC|''Japan Encyclopedia'', p. 425.|page=425}}</ref> This was considered a high-Ranking office, Ranked only slightly below that of ''{{ill|Wakadoshiyori|en|Wakadoshiyori|qid=Q1036547|lt=Wakadoshiyori|1=Wakadoshiyori}}'' but above all other ''{{ill|Bugyō|en|Bugyō|qid=Q2535820|lt=Bugyō|1=Bugyō}}.''<ref name="b323" />
==List of ''jisha-bugyō''== :{{Incomplete list|date=December 2024}} * [[Tsuda Masatoshi]] (?-1650) * {{ill|Ōoka Tadasuke|en|Ōoka Tadasuke|qid=Q1054143|lt=Ōoka Tadasuke|1=Ōoka Tadasuke}} (1736–1751)<ref>Manabu Ōishi, ed., ''Ōoka Tadasuke'', Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, referred to in [http://www.kufs.ac.jp/toshokan/bibl/bibl177/pdf/17724.pdf ''Nihon no Rekishi'' 11], Hiroyuki Inagaki, {{ill|Kyoto University of Foreign Studies|en|Kyoto University of Foreign Studies|qid=Q6452224|lt=Kyoto University of Foreign Studies|1=Kyoto University of Foreign Studies}}</ref> * {{ill|Kuze Hirochika|en|Kuze Hirochika|qid=Q3331290|lt=Kuze Hirochika|1=Kuze Hirochika}} (1843–1848)<ref>Beasley, p. 335.</ref> * {{ill|Naitō Nobuchika|en|Naitō Nobuchika|qid=Q3331255|lt=Naitō Nobuchika|1=Naitō Nobuchika}} (1844–1848)<ref>Beaseley, p. 338.</ref> * [[Matsudaira Tadakata]] (1845)<ref name="b336" /> * [[Matsudaira Nobuatsu]] (1848–1885)<ref name="b336">Beasley, p. 336.</ref> * {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|en|Andō Nobumasa|qid=Q3208958|lt=Andō Nobumasa|1=Andō Nobumasa}} (1852–1858)<ref>Beasley, p. 331.</ref> * {{ill|Itakura Katsukiyo|en|Itakura Katsukiyo|qid=Q3155837|lt=Itakura Katsukiyo|1=Itakura Katsukiyo}} (1857–1859, 1861–1862)<ref name="b333" /> * [[Honjō Munehide]] (1858–1861)<ref>Beasley, p. 332.</ref> * {{ill|Mizuno Tadakiyo|en|Mizuno Tadakiyo|qid=Q5368702|lt=Mizuno Tadakiyo|1=Mizuno Tadakiyo}} (1858–1861)<ref>Beasley, p. 337.</ref> * {{ill|Inoue Masanao|en|Inoue Masanao|qid=Q6036674|lt=Inoue Masanao|1=Inoue Masanao}} (1861–1862)<ref name="b333">Beasley, p. 333.</ref> * {{ill|Makino Tadayuki|en|Makino Tadayuki|qid=Q6739717|lt=Makino Tadayuki|1=Makino Tadayuki}} (1862)<ref>Dunning, Eric ''et al.'' (2003). [https://books.google.com/books?id=TqyCioQFv6cC&dq=Jisha-bugy%C5%8D&pg=PT200 ''Sport: Critical Concepts in Sociology'', p. 189.]</ref> * [[Matsudaira Yasunao]] (1865)<ref name="b336" />
==See also== * {{ill|Bugyō|en|Bugyō|qid=Q2535820|lt=Bugyō|1=Bugyō}}
==Notes== {{reflist|2}}
==References== * {{ill|William G. Beasley|en|William G. Beasley|qid=Q3181262|lt=Beasley, William G.|1=William G. Beasley}} (1955). [https://books.google.com/books?id=jjOCAAAAIAAJ&q=Niigata+bugyo ''Select Documents on Japanese Foreign Policy, 1853–1868''.] London: {{ill|Oxford University Press|en|Oxford University Press|qid=Q217595|lt=Oxford University Press|1=Oxford University Press}}. [reprinted by [[:en:RoutledgeCurzon|RoutledgeCurzon]], London, 2001. {{ISBN|978-0-19-713508-2}} (cloth)] * Dunning, Eric and Dominic Malcolm. (2003). [https://books.google.com/books?id=TqyCioQFv6cC&q=Jisha-bugy%C5%8D ''Sport: Critical Concepts in Sociology''.] London: {{ill|Taylor & Francis|en|Taylor & Francis|qid=Q880582|lt=Taylor & Francis|1=Taylor & Francis}}. {{ISBN|0-415-26294-1}} * Nussbaum, Louis-Frédéric and Käthe Roth. (2005). [https://books.google.com/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC ''Japan encyclopedia''.] Cambridge: {{ill|Harvard University Press|en|Harvard University Press|qid=Q1587900|lt=Harvard University Press|1=Harvard University Press}}. {{ISBN|978-0-674-01753-5}}; [http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/58053128?referer=di&ht=edition OCLC 58053128]
